name: Links Management & Technology S.p.A.
summary: Tech Lead within the company's competence center, providing technical direction and coordinating development teams across multiple client engagements
Mentored engineers and drove code reuse, engineering best practices and quality standards across teams
Authored and maintained detailed technical documentation for developers and stakeholders

projects.name: Sintesi — Regione Puglia
projects.description: As part of a 4-engineer team, drove the modernization of a regional employment-services platform, decomposing the legacy monolith into 15+ microservices. Championed DDD and Clean Architecture practices to elevate maintainability and test coverage.

projects.name: Sifer — Regione Emilia-Romagna
projects.description: Tech Lead on the full rewrite of Sifer, leading a 4-engineer team and setting the technical direction and delivery cadence. Architected a reusable component library of 25+ components, later adopted by other teams across the competence center.
